data.name: AbsorptionThresholdDesc
data.value: Minimum distance between the close and the delta extremes to consider absorption

data.name: AccountInfoDisplayDescription
data.value: Displays detailed account information on the chart

data.name: AddWidgetToAreaLabel
data.value: Add a chart, order book, time & sales, or any other widget to this area.

data.name: AlertFileDescription
data.value: Custom alert sound settings. The selected file must be in WAV format and located in the C:\Program Files (x86)\ATAS Platform\Sounds folder.

data.name: AlertFilterDescription
data.value: Notification when manually set volume level is reached.

data.name: AlertIntervalDescription
data.value: Time in seconds of next repeated alert

data.name: AtasXAccessDeniedHeader
data.value: You don't have access to ATAS X.

data.name: AtasXAccessDeniedMessage
data.value: Your current plan doesn't support this version. To unlock ATAS X (Beta), purchase an Ultra plan.

data.name: AtasXAccessDeniedPromoHeader
data.value: You don’t have early access to ATAS X.

data.name: AtasXAccessDeniedPromoMessage
data.value: To unlock early access to ATAS X (Beta), you need to purchase the Ultra plan.

data.name: ATRLengthDescription
data.value: Length of the ATR calculation used for tolerance.

data.name: AutoAddCrossTradingIndicatorDescription
data.value: Automatically adds or removes the Cross Trading Best Prices indicator on charts when cross-trading is activated or deactivated.

data.name: BarDirVsDeltaDivergenceDescription
data.value: Determines whether to display divergence, which occurs when the direction of the bar and the delta value are opposite: in the case of a bullish bar, the delta is negative, and in the case of a bearish bar, the delta is positive.

data.name: BreakevenTooltip
data.value:
Allows moving SL order when specified profit value is reached for the position. Moving SL order to breakeven triggers only once.
Parameters: • Breakeven — profit value at which SL order should be moved to another level • Offset — offset from the average position price to which SL order should be moved after reaching the specified profit value

data.name: BreakevenTrailingRequiresSL
data.value: Breakeven and Trailing become active only after enabling the SL checkbox

data.name: BreakoutRetestPeriodDescription
data.value: Number of bars to look back for identifying pivot points.

data.name: BuyTradeLineColorDescription
data.value: Specifies the color used to display buy trade lines and markers.

data.name: CancelAllOrdersAndPositionsTooltip
data.value: Cancel all orders and close all positions for selected accounts

data.name: CancelAllOrdersForInstrumentTooltip
data.value: Cancel all orders for this instrument

data.name: CandlesDirectionModeDescription
data.value: Determines how candle direction (up/down) is calculated for coloring. Choose between Close vs Open (traditional), Delta (based on buy/sell pressure), Close vs Median (relative to candle's average price), or Close vs POC (relative to Point of Control).

data.name: ChangePeriodOrSelectAccount
data.value: Change the period or select another account.

data.name: ChangeScaleDescription
data.value: Mouse wheel scroll modifier key to change the price scale.

data.name: CheckConnectorForMissingInstrument
data.value: Please wait while the connection is initializing. If the instrument does not appear shortly, check the status:

data.name: CloseCurrentWorkspaceMessage1
data.value: Save your workspace to use it the next time you launch the app

data.name: CloseTabQuestionMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to close this tab? All content will be lost.

data.name: CloseWindowQuestionMessage
data.value: Upon closing this window, all content of the window will be lost. What would you like to do?

data.name: ColorDescription
data.value: Specifies the color for this element.

data.name: ColumnSpacingDescription
data.value: Space between label and value columns

data.name: ConfirmationMultiplierDescription
data.value: Divides the main period by this number for confirmation length.

data.name: ContinueWorkspaceSubtitle
data.value: To continue choose one of the options

data.name: CreateFirstPlaybookHint
data.value: Click the "Add Playbook" button to create your first playbook

data.name: CreatePlaybookHelperText
data.value: Add a new playbook to structure your trading setups

data.name: CryptoMetricsGroupDescription
data.value:
Analysis of specific crypto market data.

  • Sentiment monitoring: open interest, liquidations, and position ratios in real time.
  • Market context: accumulation and distribution zones based on fundamental data.
  • Capital flow: network activity and financial flows on blockchain and exchanges.

Important: availability of some metrics depends on the selected instrument.

data.name: CustomSessionTimezoneHint
data.value: Enter the session time in your local timezone.

data.name: DaysFixedTooltip
data.value: Activating this feature allows you to change the timeframe without resetting the specified count of days to the standard values.

data.name: DeleteAccountConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this account from statistics? The data will be permanently deleted.

data.name: DeletePlaybookConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this playbook?

data.name: DepthChangesFilterDescription
data.value: Minimum size filter for depth changes

data.name: DepthChangesTextColorDescription
data.value: Text color for depth change labels

data.name: DOMProDescription
data.value: A universal DOM template focused on speed, precision, and clarity. Ideal for active intraday trading: compact interface, intuitive order control, and real-time volume and liquidity visualization. Everything you need — right at your fingertips.

data.name: DontAskAgainInTables
data.value: Do not ask for confirmation in tables again

data.name: DuplicateConnectorCredentials
data.value: A connector with the same credentials is already connected. Use the existing connection or enter different login credentials.

data.name: EditInExtendedSettingsTooltip
data.value: To edit settings while position is open, use extended settings

data.name: EnableCrossTradingDescription
data.value: Enables the ability to place trades on a different instrument than the one displayed in the chart or Smart DOM. When enabled, the platform allows you to decouple market analysis from trade execution — for example, analyzing ES while routing trades to MES.

data.name: ErrorSaveWorkspaceOnClosingMessage
data.value: An error occurred while saving workspace.

data.name: FailedToLoadPlatformSettingsMsg
data.value: Failed to load platform settings, using default settings.

data.name: FitToPriceRangeDescription
data.value: Draw session area only between the high and low of the period

data.name: FlattenAllConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to close/cancel all positions and orders? This action will affect all selected instruments and cannot be undone

data.name: FractalPeriodDescription
data.value: The number of bars on each side of the center bar required to identify a fractal.

data.name: IBPreviousDayEquityWithLoanValue
data.value: Previous Day Equity With Loan Value

data.name: IndicatorLoadError
data.value: Failed to load indicator settings. The indicator may be incompatible with this version of the platform.

data.name: IndicatorProtectedFromDebugging
data.value: The indicator is protected from debugging.

data.name: InstrumentDragHandleTooltip
data.value: Drag to another module to open instrument

data.name: InstrumentNotLoadedStrategySettingsHint
data.value: The instrument is not loaded. Open a chart or Smart DOM for this instrument to enable strategy settings.

data.name: InstrumentNotSupportedByLiquidationsFeed
data.value: Current instrument is not supported by the Liquidations data feed.

data.name: InstrumentNotSupportedByLongShortRatioFeed
data.value: Current instrument is not supported by the Long/Short Ratio data feed.

data.name: InstrumentNotSupportedByOpenInterestFeed
data.value: Current instrument is not supported by the Open Interest data feed.

data.name: InsufficientDataForPeriod
data.value: There is insufficient data for this period.

data.name: LabelDisplayDescription
data.value: Control label visibility: Hide, Short (direction + result), Full (with prices)

data.name: LargeChangeScaleDescription
data.value: Key-Modifier on mouse scroll to change price scale by 10x

data.name: LevelsDescription
data.value: Number of order book levels to analyze. More levels provide a more complete liquidity picture.

data.name: LiquidationOrdersAggregationModeGlobalDescription
data.value: Aggregates all available liquidation orders across symbols and exchanges.

data.name: LiquidationOrdersAggregationModeLocalDescription
data.value: Aggregates liquidation orders for a specific symbol on a specific exchange.

data.name: LiquidationOrdersAggregationModesDescription
data.value: Defines how liquidation events are aggregated.

data.name: LiquidationOrdersAggregationModeSymbolGlobalDescription
data.value: Aggregates liquidation orders for a specific symbol across all exchanges where it is listed.

data.name: LoadPlatformSettingsErrorMsg
data.value: Failed to load platform settings. The application will now close.

data.name: LossTradeResultColorDescription
data.value: Specifies the color used for the result section of losing trades.

data.name: NoDataSessionHint
data.value: You can change the trading session in the panel below.

data.name: NotificationFlowDirectionDescription
data.value: The direction notifications occupy when several are visible.

data.name: OHLCPlusDescription
data.value: Extended price levels indicator showing OHLC, Equilibrium, POC and Value Area levels for

data.name: OnlyCryptoInstrumentsSupportedMessage
data.value: Current instrument is not supported, please open crypto instrument.

data.name: OnlyTimeFrameChartsSupported
data.value: Only standard timeframe charts (1M and above) are supported.

data.name: OptionsBoardAccountRequiredMessage
data.value: Please select a trading account that supports options data

data.name: OptionsBoardHint
data.value: Use the controls above to get started

data.name: OptionsBoardLoadingDataMessage
data.value: Please wait while options data is being loaded

data.name: OptionsBoardLoadingOptionSeriesMessage
data.value: Please wait while option series are being loaded

data.name: OptionsBoardNotAvailableInReplay
data.value: Options Board is not available in Replay mode

data.name: OptionsBoardSeriesRequiredMessage
data.value: Please select an option series to view the options board

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoIndicatorsDisabled
data.value: Indicators usage on charts (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoIndicatorsPerChart
data.value: Maximum indicators per chart (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoTimeFrameCumulativeTradesDisabled
data.value: Cumulative trades timeframe usage (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoTimeFrameOrderFlowDisabled
data.value: Order flow timeframe usage (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoTimeFrameUniqRangeDisabled
data.value: Unique range timeframe usage (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_CryptoTimeFrameUniqReversalDisabled
data.value: Unique reversal timeframe usage (for crypto instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_IndicatorsDisabled
data.value: Indicators usage on charts (for standard instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_IndicatorsPerChart
data.value: Maximum indicators per chart (for standard instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_TimeFrameCumulativeTradesDisabled
data.value: Cumulative trades timeframe usage (for standard instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_TimeFrameOrderFlowDisabled
data.value: Order flow timeframe usage (for standard instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_TimeFrameUniqRangeDisabled
data.value: Unique range timeframe usage (for standard instruments)

data.name: PayWallFeature_TimeFrameUniqReversalDisabled
data.value: Unique reversal timeframe usage (for standard instruments)

data.name: PlatformTimeAdjustedDaylight
data.value: The time has been adjusted due to the daylight saving time change

data.name: PlatformTimeSetToLocal
data.value: The platform is set to the local time. You can change the settings in the "Time Zones" section.

data.name: PlaybookDescription
data.value: A playbook is a trading strategy or setup that you use repeatedly. Tag your trades with playbooks to track performance by strategy and identify what works best for you.

data.name: PlaybooksDescription
data.value: Create and track performance of your trading strategies

data.name: PriceAxisLinkHintDifferentInstrumentFormat
data.value: {0} window has a different instrument. Place a chart or heatmap with the same instrument to the left or right.

data.name: PriceAxisLinkHintPlaceAdjacent
data.value: Place a chart or heatmap with the same instrument to the left or right to link.

data.name: ProfileWidthFactorDescription
data.value: Adjusts the volume profile width relative to the area bounds. Works independently of Auto Proportion.

data.name: ProfitLossDistributionByHour
data.value: Profit/loss distribution by hour of day

data.name: ProfitTradeResultColorDescription
data.value: Specifies the color used for the result section of profitable trades.

data.name: RithmicAutoLiquidateIgnoreOpenPnlWhenTrailing
data.value: Auto Liquidate Ignore Open PnL When Trailing

data.name: RithmicAutoLiquidateMaxMinAccountBalance
data.value: Auto Liquidate Max Min Account Balance

data.name: RmsAnyTimeDescription
data.value: Can change settings at any time, even when blocked

data.name: RmsCannotChangeSettings
data.value: Cannot change settings while account is blocked.

data.name: RmsConfirmDisabledText
data.value: I understand I will not be able to change settings once a limit is reached, until the daily reset

data.name: RmsConfirmPassphraseText
data.value: I understand that I will need to type a discipline phrase to change settings when blocked

data.name: RmsConfirmReduceOnlyText
data.value: I understand that when limits are reached, I will only be able to close positions

data.name: RmsDisabledWhenBlockedDescription
data.value: Cannot change settings while account is blocked

data.name: RmsFileLockedMessageFormat
RmsImmediateBlockBannerText
data.value: These settings will block your account immediately!

data.name: RmsImmediateBlockConfirmText
data.value: I understand that my account will be blocked immediately

data.name: RmsImmediateBlockReason1
data.value: Your current metrics already exceed the new limits you're setting.

data.name: RmsImmediateBlockReason2
data.value: Account will enter Reduce Only mode immediately after saving.

data.name: RmsImmediateBlockReason3
data.value: Opening new positions and increasing existing ones will be blocked.

data.name: RmsImmediateBlockWarning
data.value: Saving these settings will immediately block this account.

data.name: RmsNotificationOnlyDescription
data.value: Alerts only, trading is not restricted

data.name: RmsPassphraseBannerText
data.value: You are about to override your own discipline

data.name: RmsPassphraseRequired
data.value: I am breaking my trading discipline

data.name: RmsPassphraseWhenBlockedDescription
data.value: Must type a discipline phrase to change settings when blocked

data.name: RmsProtectionPoint1
data.value: • Protect you from emotional trading decisions

data.name: RmsProtectionPoint2
data.value: • Prevent impulsive changes to risk limits after losses

data.name: RmsProtectionPoint3
data.value: • Enforce discipline when you need it most

data.name: RmsReduceOnlyDescription
data.value: Can only close positions when any limit is hit

data.name: RmsReduceOnlyFullDescription
data.value: When any limit is hit, opening new positions and increasing existing ones will be blocked. Closing positions will remain available.

data.name: RmsResetDescription
data.value: Daily P&L, trades count and consecutive losses reset at this time

data.name: RmsSettingsAnytimeDescription
data.value: You will be able to change settings at any time, even when account is blocked.

data.name: RmsSettingsDisabledDescription
data.value: You will not be able to change settings once a limit is reached, until the daily reset.

data.name: RmsSettingsPassphraseDescription
data.value: Once account enters blocked state, you will need to type a discipline phrase to change settings. This creates a psychological barrier while still allowing changes if truly needed.

data.name: RmsTradingOrGamblingQuestion
data.value: Are you trading, or are you gambling?

data.name: RmsTriggeredDailyLossFormat
data.value: Daily Loss: Current P&L ({0}) exceeds limit (-${1:#,0})

data.name: RmsTriggeredDailyTargetFormat
data.value: Daily Target: Current P&L ({0}) exceeds target (+${1:#,0})

data.name: RmsTypePhrasePrompt
data.value: To continue, type the exact phrase:

data.name: RmsWaitForReset
data.value: Wait for daily reset to change settings.

data.name: SaveCurrentTimeTemplateBtn
data.value: Save a template from the current time

data.name: SaveCurrentWorkspaceWithName
data.value: Save the current workspace with the name

data.name: SearchInstrumentNameHint
data.value: To display search results, start typing the name of the tool.

data.name: SearchInstrumentNameNullTextDescription
data.value: To display search results, start typing the name of the tool.

data.name: SellTradeLineColorDescription
data.value: Specifies the color used to display sell trade lines and markers.

data.name: SessionTooShort
data.value: Session duration must be at least {0} hour(s).

data.name: SetFromDateToModulesTooltip
data.value: Reloads data in all open modules (charts, indicators, SmartDOM) to the start date. Use this if you opened new panels after loading data or changed the replay period.

data.name: ShowBlockedMarginDescription
data.value: Display margin locked by open positions

data.name: ShowTradeTooltipDescription
data.value: Determines whether to show a tooltip with trade details when hovering over trade markers.

data.name: SkipFlattenAllConfirmation
data.value: Skip cancel and close all confirmation

data.name: SkipFlattenAllConfirmationDescription
data.value: Don't ask for confirmation when closing all positions and orders in this widget.

data.name: SkipTableConfirmationsDescription
data.value: Skip confirmation dialogs when canceling orders or closing positions in tables (Orders, Positions, Trading Activity).

data.name: SlidingMaxMultiplierDescription
data.value: Multiplier for the main period to calculate sliding maximum values. The time window for tracking maximum volumes

data.name: SmartDOMTemplateDamaged
data.value: Template "{0}" of smart DOM module is corrupted.

data.name: SmartDOMTemplateDamagedWithRecovery
data.value: Template "{0}" of smart DOM module is corrupted. Restore template?

data.name: SmoothDescription
data.value: Smoothing period applied to the indicator values.

data.name: StepScaleDescription
data.value: This parameter sets the price scaling step when scrolling the mouse wheel.

data.name: TableActionConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to close/cancel positions and orders? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ToGetStartedAddAppropriateWidget
data.value: To get started, add the appropriate widget.

data.name: ToGetStartedWithPlatformOpenNewTab
data.value: To get started with the platform, open a new tab.

data.name: TrailingTooltip
data.value:
Allows moving SL order when the current price moves in the direction of increasing profit for the position. If the price continues moving towards profit, the SL order can be moved multiple times.
Parameters: • Trailing Stop — value by which the price must move from the previous level for the SL order to be moved to a new level • Trailing Step — step at which SL order will be moved relative to the previous SL order price

data.name: TrainingMinutesDescription
data.value: Training period for collecting historical data and calculating liquidity maximums. After training completes, values will be normalized against observed maximums.

data.name: UseAlertDescription
data.value: Notifications about events detected by the indicator.

data.name: UserNotWhitelistedMessage
data.value: Unfortunately, your account is not on the allowlist, so access to the platform is currently unavailable. If you’d like to request access or think this might be an error, please reach out to our support team — we’ll be happy to help.

data.name: VWMADescription
data.value: The Volume Weighted Moving Average (VWMA) Indicator is a sophisticated technical analysis tool that calculates the average price of an asset while taking into account the volume traded at each price level.

data.name: WatchlistDragHandleTooltip
data.value: Change order in list or drag to a module to open

data.name: WatchlistListAlreadyExistsQuestion
data.value: A list with this name already exists. Overwrite it?

data.name: WeightDecayDescription
data.value: Exponential weight decay parameter. Lower values give more weight to levels near the market, higher values distribute weights more evenly across depth.

data.name: YourWorkspaceLimitedTitle
data.value: The workspace being loaded contains elements not available in your plan

data.name: DivergenceBarsDescription
data.value: Highlights divergence bars in the Delta panel when bar direction and delta are opposite.

data.name: DivergenceDotsDescription
data.value: Shows divergence markers on the price chart when bar direction and delta are opposite.
